result.summary: Found 1 issue: a text truncation problem in the horizontal navigation tabs where a tab label is cut off.

issues.description: The rightmost navigation tab displays truncated text 'Hot Gam' instead of the full label (likely 'Hot Games'). The text is being cut off at the edge of the navigation bar.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation container width, reduce font size, use abbreviated text, implement horizontal scrolling, or use a responsive layout that stacks tabs on smaller viewports to ensure all tab labels display fully without truncation.
